_comment: Batch spec for: go run ./cmd/codex --config cmd/codex/config.yml --generate-images <this-file>. Writes N variants per job to www/res/img/items/_candidates/<id>/, then review/accept in the codex item editor. Top-level fields are defaults; per-job fields override them. 'anchor' = init_image (keeps silhouette, id or path), 'style' = style_image (bitforge only). FAMILY FLOW: generate a base member from text first (no anchor), promote your favourite in the gallery, THEN run the tier jobs with anchor set to that base id so they share its shape.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, soft, antialiased, smooth, low quality, modern, realistic, photograph, 3d render, text, letters, words, people, faces

jobs.prompt: a small round glass potion vial with a cork stopper, filled with glowing crimson red liquid, fantasy RPG item icon, centered
the same glass potion vial filled with deeper glowing red liquid, slightly more ornate, brighter magical glow
the same glass potion vial filled with radiant scarlet liquid, gold trim on the cork, strong magical aura
a brown leather adventurer's backpack, bedroll strapped on top, fantasy RPG item icon, centered
